summary: Completed E2E testing of Admin and Founder onboarding flows. Backend APIs working correctly (11/12 tests passed). Frontend flows functional with minor UI bug fixed.

minor.issue: Returns 500 when startups created via onboarding are missing required fields (logo_url, description, health_score, last_report_date, next_report_due)

ui_bugs.issue: Literal \n character displayed in sidebar - FIXED

integration_issues.issue: After completing onboarding, user is redirected to login page instead of workspace. This is because the founder user is created during onboarding but no auth token is returned/stored.

action_items: Fix /api/portfolio/startups to handle startups with missing optional fields (make fields optional in StartupResponse model or set defaults during company import)
Fix founder onboarding completion to either: (a) return auth token after creating founder user, or (b) redirect to login with success message
Consider making /founder/onboarding route accessible without authentication (only with valid invitation token) for better UX
critical_code_review_comments: api.js had nested object bug - adminOnboarding and founderOnboarding were inside reports object due to missing closing brace - FIXED
EnhancedFounderOnboarding.js had literal \n character in JSX - FIXED
Startups created via bulk import are missing several required fields that StartupResponse model expects

success_rate.frontend: 85% (Admin onboarding complete, Founder onboarding complete but redirects to login)

seed_data_creation: Created test workspace, company, and founder invitation for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin onboarding flow works end-to-end. Founder onboarding flow works but redirects to login after completion instead of workspace. Backend APIs for both flows are functional. Test credentials: admin@startupintel.com/admin123, alex.thompson@startup.com/founder123

rca_of_the_issue.api_js_bug: Missing closing brace for reports object caused adminOnboarding and founderOnboarding to be nested incorrectly
rca_of_the_issue.newline_bug: Literal \n string was present in JSX template instead of actual newline
rca_of_the_issue.portfolio_500_error: Startups created via onboarding bulk import don't have all required fields that StartupResponse Pydantic model expects
